title: lilium bulbiferum var. wilsonii
intro: Lilium bulbiferum var. wilsonii, also known as Wilson's lily, is a rare and endangered species of lily plant native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wilson's lily include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lilium bulbiferum var. wilsonii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
